calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-05-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-05-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Lenoid Khmelnitsky, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by plaintiff Michael Prywes.
No appearance by defendant Regina Davis, a/k/a Regina Williams.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed on April 21, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---San Francisco Housing Authority Section 8 Contract &
Lease Agreement Amendment dated 09/28/07--------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three Day Notice ot Pay Rent of Quit dated 03/04/08---------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Michael Prywes and Lenoid Khmelnitsky, and against defendant REGINA DAVIS, a/k/a REGINA WILLIAMS as follows:

Plaintiffs Michael Prywes and Lenoid Khmelnitsky shall recover from defendant REGINA DAVIS, a/k/a REGINA WILLLIAMS Rent/Per Diem Damages in the sum of $426.95, and Costs in the amount of $350.38, for a Total Judgment for plaintiffs Michael Prywes and Lenoid Khmelnitsky in the amount of $777.33.

Plaintiffs Michael Prywes and Lenoid Khmelnitsky are entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 929 Oak Street, #3, San Francisco, CA 94117. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Continued To May-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
